summary: Phase 2 backend + frontend tested. Backend: 15/15 pytest passing (7 Phase-1 regressions + 8 new: handwritten unified summary, invalid-mode 422, videos seed/list/filter, categories, admin/check 200/401, video POST admin-guarded, video DELETE admin-guarded with persistence verification). Frontend: 5 bottom tabs (Jaap/Tracker/Videos/Insights/Settings) render; Videos tab chips + filter (All/Krishna Leela/Satsang/Kirtan) work and card list filters correctly; video card tap navigates to /video-player screen (back button + screen mount confirmed, WebView content doesn't render on web preview — expected per task note); video-admin wrong password shows 'Invalid admin password'; correct password 'naamsmaran-admin' unlocks form; new video saved via UI ('Video added') and appears in Kirtan filter. Handwriting: /write route mounts, deity selectable, SVG canvas responds to touch/mouse, Done +1 POSTs (mode=handwritten), session counter 0→1, today counter 0→1, canvas auto-clears; Clear button clears without incrementing. Returning to Jaap tab shows unified Today=1 and Lifetime=1 (handwritten counts feed same summary as tap). Phase 1 flows (deities, tap-jaap, custom deity, brahmacharya, reminders, history) untouched.

react_native_issues.issue: WebView does not render on web preview — no iframe fallback, only the surrounding React Native shell mounts. Expected per task brief (web sandbox limitation), but users viewing via Expo web will see a black area. Consider a web-only iframe fallback for the embed URL for parity. Reference: /app/frontend/app/video-player.tsx:43-59

The 'Invalid admin password' Text (authError) lacks a testID; using generic content assertion works but adding testID='admin-login-error' improves testability. Reference: /app/frontend/app/video-admin.tsx:152

action_items: (Optional polish) Add web-only iframe fallback in /app/frontend/app/video-player.tsx so YouTube embed actually plays in Expo web preview (react-native-webview is native-only).
(Optional polish) Add testID='admin-login-error' to the authError <Text> in video-admin.tsx for easier automated verification of wrong-password path.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py list_videos correctly excludes _id via projection; VideoCreate excludes admin_password from response — good.
Handwritten entries share db.jaap_entries collection with tap entries — /api/jaap/summary aggregates by guest_id regardless of mode, satisfying unification requirement.
ADMIN_PASSWORD is read from env at request time (not cached) — safe. Empty ADMIN_PASSWORD would reject all admin requests (fail-closed) — good.
video-admin auto-login validates stored password against backend on mount and removes stale token on 401 — solid pattern.
write.tsx uses optimistic UI (increment then POST) with a busy ref to prevent double-submit — correct.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of critical flows (Videos tab, filter, admin login/save, /write draw+commit, /write clear, unified summary on Jaap tab)

seed_data_creation: One admin-created video 'TEST_UI_Video' (category Kirtan) added via UI during test; also 2 backend-created TEST_admin_video docs auto-cleaned by the create+delete test. Guest jaap entries under TEST_hw_* and TEST_* guest ids remain in db.jaap_entries (isolated per random guest_id, does not affect real users).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL) — set env var before pytest. Tab bar tabBarTestID props do NOT propagate as data-testid on expo-router web; use get_by_text('Videos'/'Jaap'/...) to switch tabs in Playwright. YouTube WebView does not render on web preview — verify only that video-player-back mounts. Admin password: 'naamsmaran-admin'. video-admin auto-login via AsyncStorage may persist between runs — clear storage or use logout testID='admin-logout' if state pollution occurs.
